alt: Developing coelacanth pup/embryo attached to its large yolk sac
caption: Coelacanths are ovoviviparous; developing pups grow inside the mother attached to large yolk sacs before live birth.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated juvenile coelacanth image. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/81/Latimeria_chalumnae_embryo.jpg
